q: He was _____ by his colleagues for his careless mistake. （他被同事责备）
options: A rebuked|B condemned|C clenched|D endorsed

q: The committee _____ the new policy. （委员会批准了新政策）
options: A rejected|B endorsed|C redeemed|D clenched
A complex|B simple|C clear|D brief
A achieve overnight|B achieve gradually|C give up|D take time
A Keep pace with the times|B go back to the past|C stand still|D fall behind
A Economic globalization|B political reform|C cultural exchange|D technological progress
A Sustainable development|B fast growth|C economic expansion|D industrial progress
A People centered|B economy first|C profit oriented|D state centered
A Circular economy|B linear economy|C market economy|D planned economy
A Trade surplus|B trade deficit|C trade balance|D trade war
A intellectual property|B physical property|C public property|D private property

q: The leaders _____ to work together for peace. （领导人承诺合作）
options: A pledged|B redeemed|C condemned|D clenched

q: He _____ his promise by returning the money. （他兑现了承诺）
options: A redeemed|B condemned|C clenched|D endorsed

q: She _____ her fists in anger. （她愤怒地握紧拳头）
options: A clenched|B condemned|C endorsed|D redeemed

q: The movie was widely _____ for its violence. （影片因暴力广受谴责）
options: A condemned|B endorsed|C clenched|D redeemed
A Reform and opening up|B closing down|C isolation|D restriction
A build a moderately prosperous society in all respects|B eliminate poverty only|C urbanize fully|D industrialize
A the Belt and Road Initiative|B one road one belt|C the silk road fund|D the trade zone
A the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation|B Chinese expansion|C cultural revival only|D national wealth
A supply-side structural reform|B demand-side reform|C fiscal reform|D financial reform

q: The report _____ the importance of education. （报告强调了教育的重要性）
options: A underlined|B clenched|C redeemed|D condemned
A infrastructure|B superstructure|C structure|D construction
A poverty alleviation|B poverty increase|C wealth concentration|D urban expansion
A high-quality development|B high-speed growth|C low-quality expansion|D rough development
